nodes.name: Get Cleaning Job
nodes.notes: Lookup CleaningJobs by bookingUid from webhook payload.

nodes.name: Check Lookup and Merge
nodes.notes: If no row: _error Invalid booking. Else validate required columns (Fix #5) then merge job + webhook body.

nodes.name: If Invalid Booking
nodes.notes: FALSE = has _error → respond error. TRUE = continue to validations.

nodes.name: Validations
nodes.notes: Validate cleanerId match, status ASSIGNED, clockInTimeUTC empty, calendarEventId exists, server time >= checkoutTimeUTC only.

nodes.name: If Validation Failed
nodes.notes: FALSE = validation error → respond error. TRUE = continue to GPS.

nodes.name: Get Property Coords
nodes.notes: Lookup CleanersProfile by propertyUid for propertyLat, propertyLng.

nodes.name: Haversine and GPS Status
nodes.notes: Distance in meters; gpsStatus INSIDE_RADIUS if <= 100m else OUTSIDE_RADIUS. Do not block clock-in. NaN GPS returns 400 (Fix #4).

nodes.name: If GPS Invalid
nodes.notes: TRUE = no GPS error → Late Check. FALSE = Invalid GPS coordinates → Respond Error Validation (400).

nodes.name: Late Check
nodes.notes: lateFlag = true if serverTime > scheduledCleaningTimeUTC + 1 hour. No hardcoded 11:00.

nodes.name: If Late
nodes.notes: TRUE = send Late Clock-In Alert email then continue. FALSE = continue without email.

parameters.subject: Late Clock-In Alert

nodes.name: Send Late Clock-In Email
nodes.notes: SMTP: Subject 'Late Clock-In Alert'. Configure SMTP credentials and N8N_ALERT_EMAIL.

nodes.name: Re-Fetch Job Before Update
nodes.notes: Fix #3: Re-fetch latest row by bookingUid immediately before update to prevent race condition.

nodes.name: Check Race Condition
nodes.notes: If clockInTimeUTC not empty at update time → 409. Else pass pre-update payload.

nodes.name: If Race Condition
nodes.notes: TRUE = safe to update. FALSE = 409 Clock-in already recorded.

nodes.name: Respond 409 Already Recorded
nodes.notes: Fix #3: Return 409 when clock-in already recorded (double submission).

nodes.name: Update Cleaning Job Row
nodes.notes: Set clockInTimeUTC, gpsClockInLat, gpsClockInLng, gpsStatus, lateFlag, status IN_PROGRESS.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Clock-in successful', gpsStatus: $json.gpsStatus, lateFlag: $json.lateFlag }) }}
